title: Spicy Korean Sujebi Ramen
description: A fusion of Korean and sujebi flavors in a spicy noodle soup. The sujebi adds a unique texture and the Korean chili flakes give it a bold kick.
instructions: Cut the sujebi into small pieces and set aside.
Cook the noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the beef broth, Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and sugar. Bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the sujebi. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Serve the sujebi ramen hot, garnished with green onions.
